case_title: MAIER, SUSANNE VS BAY ALARM et al

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO SEP-28-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02 TRIAL OF SEP-06-1994 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MAIER, SUSANNE AS TO DEFENDANT BAY ALARM KENNEDY, WILLIAM P. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-06-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAIER, SUSANNE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BAY ALARM KENNEDY, WILLIAM P. PLTF ACCEPTED PAYMENT OF $946 FROM DEFT'S INS. CARRIER FOR SETTLEMENT OF CASE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
